# Bitstamp.Net Full AI Reference

This file is optimized for AI coding assistants. It maps the actual Bitstamp.Net API shape, options, endpoint groups, symbols, and common implementation patterns.

## Identity

- Repository: `JKorf/Bitstamp.Net`
- Package: `Bitstamp.Net`
- Current project version: `1.1.2`
- Base library: `CryptoExchange.Net`
- REST client: `BitstampRestClient`
- Socket client: `BitstampSocketClient`
- Credentials: `BitstampCredentials(string key, string secret)`

Bitstamp.Net is organized around one `ExchangeApi` root.

## Correct Setup

```csharp
using Bitstamp.Net;
using Bitstamp.Net.Clients;
using Bitstamp.Net.Enums;

var restClient = new BitstampRestClient(options =>
{
    options.ApiCredentials = new BitstampCredentials("API_KEY", "API_SECRET");
    options.Environment = BitstampEnvironment.Live;
});

var socketClient = new BitstampSocketClient(options =>
{
    options.ApiCredentials = new BitstampCredentials("API_KEY", "API_SECRET");
});
```

## Options

REST options:

- `BitstampRestOptions.Environment`
- `BitstampRestOptions.ApiCredentials`
- `BitstampRestOptions.ApiOptions`

Socket options:

- `BitstampSocketOptions.Environment`
- `BitstampSocketOptions.ApiCredentials`
- `BitstampSocketOptions.SocketSubscriptionsCombineTarget`, default `10`
- `BitstampSocketOptions.ApiOptions.PingInterval`, default 30 seconds

Global defaults:

```csharp
BitstampRestClient.SetDefaultOptions(options =>
{
    options.ApiCredentials = new BitstampCredentials("API_KEY", "API_SECRET");
});
```

Dependency injection is available through `services.AddBitstamp(...)`.

## REST API Map

### ExchangeData

Use `restClient.ExchangeApi.ExchangeData` for public symbols, tickers, books, trades, funding, and collateral metadata:

- `GetSymbolsAsync()`
- `GetAssetsAsync()`
- `GetAllTickersAsync()`
- `GetTickerAsync(symbol)`
- `GetHourTickerAsync(symbol)`
- `GetKlinesAsync(symbol, KlineInterval.OneMinute, limit, startTime, endTime, excludeCurrentCandle)`
- `GetOrderBookAsync(symbol)`
- `GetTradesAsync(symbol, Period? period = null)`
- `GetEurUsdConversionRateAsync()`
- `GetFundingRateAsync(symbol)`
- `GetFundingRateHistoryAsync(symbol, startTime, endTime, limit)`
- `GetMarginTiersAsync()`
- `GetCollateralAssetsAsync()`

### Account

Use `restClient.ExchangeApi.Account` for authenticated balances, fees, user transactions, deposits, withdrawals, margin info, and leverage:

- `GetAccountBalancesAsync()`
- `GetAccountBalanceAsync(asset)`
- `GetWithdrawFeesAsync()`
- `GetWithdrawFeesAsync(asset, network)`
- `GetAllFeesAsync()`
- `GetFeesAsync(symbol)`
- `GetUserTransactionsAsync(...)`
- `GetUserTransactionsAsync(symbol, ...)`
- `GetSymbolsAsync()`
- `GetMaxTradeQuantityAsync(symbol, marginMode, leverage, orderType, side, ...)`
- `GetWithdrawalsAsync(id, maxAge, limit, offset)`
- `WithdrawFiatAsync(...)`
- `CancelWithdrawalAsync(id)`
- `GetFiatWithdrawalStatusAsync(id)`
- `WithdrawCryptoAsync(asset, quantity, address, network, memoId, destinationTag, transferId, beneficiaryThirdparty)`
- `GetDepositAddressAsync(asset, network)`
- `GetCryptoTransactionsAsync(includeIous, startTime, endTime, limit, offset)`
- `GetDepositsAsync(status, startTime, endTime, limit, offset)`
- `GetMarginInfoAsync()`
- `GetLeverageSettingsAsync(marginMode, symbol)`
- `SetLeverageAsync(marginMode, symbol, leverage)`

### Trading

Use `restClient.ExchangeApi.Trading` for spot orders and derivatives positions:

- `PlaceLimitOrderAsync(symbol, side, price, orderType, quantity, limitPrice, dailyOrder, iocOrder, fokOrder, mocOrder, gtdOrder, reduceOnly, leverage, stopPrice, triggerType, activationPrice, trailingDelta, marginMode, expireTime, clientOrderId)`
- `PlaceMarketOrderAsync(symbol, side, orderType, quantity, reduceOnly, leverage, stopPrice, triggerType, activationPrice, trailingDelta, marginMode, clientOrderId)`
- `CancelOrderAsync(orderId, clientOrderId)`
- `GetOrderHistoryAsync(orderSource, symbol, fromEventId, toEventId)`
- `CancelAllOrdersAsync()`
- `CancelAllOrdersAsync(symbol)`
- `GetOrderAsync(orderId, clientOrderId, includeTrades)`
- `ReplaceOrderAsync(price, quantity, id, clientOrderId, newClientOrderId)`
- `GetOpenOrdersAsync()`
- `GetOpenOrdersAsync(symbol)`
- `GetDerivativesUserTradesAsync(...)`
- `GetDerivativesUserTradesAsync(symbol, ...)`
- `GetOpenPositionsAsync()`
- `GetOpenPositionsAsync(symbol)`
- `GetPositionStatusAsync(positionId)`
- `GetPositionHistoryAsync(...)`
- `GetPositionHistoryAsync(symbol, ...)`
- `ClosePositionsAsync(symbol, marginMode)`
- `ClosePositionAsync(positionId)`
- `GetPositionSettlementTransactionsAsync(...)`
- `GetPositionSettlementTransactionsAsync(symbol, ...)`
- `UpdatePositionCollateralAsync(positionId, newCollateralQuantity)`

Order enums:

- `OrderSide.Buy`, `OrderSide.Sell`
- `OrderType.Limit`, `Market`, `StopMarket`, `StopLimit`, `TakeProfit`, `TakeProfitLimit`, `TrailingStopLoss`, `TrailingTakeProfit`
- `MarginMode.Cross`, `MarginMode.Isolated`
- `TriggerType.LastTradePrice`, `IndexPrice`, `MarkPrice`
- `OrderSource.Orderbook`, `OrderSource.StopOrder`

## Websocket API Map

Use `socketClient.ExchangeApi`.

Public subscriptions:

- `SubscribeToTradeUpdatesAsync(symbol, onMessage)`
- `SubscribeToFullOrderBookUpdatesAsync(symbol, onMessage)`
- `SubscribeToOrderBookSnapshotUpdatesAsync(symbol, onMessage)`
- `SubscribeToFundingRateUpdatesAsync(symbol, onMessage)`

Private subscriptions:

- `SubscribeToOrderUpdatesAsync(symbol, onMessage)`
- `SubscribeToUserTradeUpdatesAsync(symbol, onMessage)`

Socket callbacks receive `DataEvent<T>`. The order book update model has `Bids`, `Asks`, and `Timestamp`.

## Symbols

Bitstamp symbols are slash-separated:

- `ETH/USD`
- `BTC/USD`
- `ETH/USD-PERP`

Use:

```csharp
var symbols = await restClient.ExchangeApi.ExchangeData.GetSymbolsAsync();
var ethUsd = symbols.Data.SingleOrDefault(x => x.Name == "ETH/USD");
```

Avoid:

```text
ETHUSDT
ETH_USDT
ETH-USDT
tETHUSD
SpotApiV3
UsdFuturesApiV3
FuturesApiV2
```

## Result Handling

```csharp
var result = await restClient.ExchangeApi.ExchangeData.GetOrderBookAsync("ETH/USD");
if (!result.Success)
{
    Console.WriteLine($"Bitstamp error: {result.Error}");
    return;
}

Console.WriteLine(result.Data.Bids.Length);
```

For sockets:

```csharp
var sub = await socketClient.ExchangeApi.SubscribeToTradeUpdatesAsync("ETH/USD", update =>
{
    Console.WriteLine(update.Data.Price);
});

if (!sub.Success)
{
    Console.WriteLine(sub.Error);
    return;
}

await socketClient.UnsubscribeAsync(sub.Data);
```

## Shared Clients

Bitstamp.Net implements CryptoExchange.Net shared APIs:

- `restClient.ExchangeApi.SharedClient`
- `socketClient.ExchangeApi.SharedClient`

Supported trading modes include spot and linear perpetuals.

## Local State Helpers

Use built-in helpers instead of manually maintaining complex local state:

- `BitstampOrderBookFactory`
- `BitstampSymbolOrderBook`
- `BitstampTrackerFactory`
- `BitstampUserSpotDataTracker`
- `BitstampUserFuturesDataTracker`

## Known Nonexistent Patterns

These are wrong for Bitstamp.Net:

```csharp
client.SpotApi.ExchangeData.GetTickerAsync("ETHUSDT");
client.UsdFuturesApi.Trading.PlaceOrderAsync(...);
client.ExchangeApi.Account.GetBalancesAsync();
new BitstampCredentials("key", "secret", "passphrase");
BinPeriod.OneMinute;
```

Use:

```csharp
client.ExchangeApi.ExchangeData.GetTickerAsync("ETH/USD");
client.ExchangeApi.Trading.PlaceLimitOrderAsync("ETH/USD", OrderSide.Buy, 2000m, OrderType.Limit, 0.1m);
client.ExchangeApi.Account.GetAccountBalancesAsync();
new BitstampCredentials("key", "secret");
KlineInterval.OneMinute;
```
